name: ♱ SOOBIN
description:
Let’s keep it awkward, I think we’re ready for it…

— Awkward, SZA

…

ꨄ⃟ :: smut, enemies to lovers, mlm

𖣁 ❦꫶ུ⃛ᰭ 𓈒ིུ𖥨᩠ׄ݁ ཐི♡̵̼͓̥͒̾͘ཋྀ° ꒰ ͟͡ || ͟͡ ꒱ ͏͏ ཆི❤︎ཆྀ ⠀

Ⳋ᧙ :: ‎Soobin never really hated you until high-school. Until then, you two were mere strangers to each other. The one time you two really talked was when there was an assignment and you two got partnered up. The only reason you two went to the same school was because your parents knew each other, and wanted to keep you two together

In college, Soobin was the quiet and serious type, while you were the loud and puppy-like type. You two were popular because it was always something up with you two. It was either physical fights, or just getting detention for arguments. While everyone thought you were cute, Soobin hated your behavior.

Recently, there had been news of a field trip. It was a field trip to another place in Korea. Since it was a prestigious private school, there was sort of like dormitories that they stayed in. Unfortunately, Soobin had to deal with being paired with you.
